markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential acquisition of Third Bridge by GrowthX.ai](https://fathom.video/share/YBGoPVbw2DU9tzmjRy_EsyGazvJ-pxja?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX.ai sees Third Bridge as a strategic fit, providing niche expertise in music/entertainment content and access to high-profile clients](https://fathom.video/share/YBGoPVbw2DU9tzmjRy_EsyGazvJ-pxja?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Third Bridge has a vast network of subject matter experts but faces challenges adapting to AI-driven content creation](https://fathom.video/share/YBGoPVbw2DU9tzmjRy_EsyGazvJ-pxja?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [GrowthX.ai has a powerful AI-driven content platform with 70%+ gross margins, seeking to expand into new verticals](https://fathom.video/share/YBGoPVbw2DU9tzmjRy_EsyGazvJ-pxja?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Timing depends on GrowthX.ai completing their Series B funding (40-60M raise in progress)](https://fathom.video/share/YBGoPVbw2DU9tzmjRy_EsyGazvJ-pxja?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Topics

### Company Backgrounds

  - [GrowthX.ai:](https://fathom.video/share/YBGoPVbw2DU9tzmjRy_EsyGazvJ-pxja?tab=summary&timestamp=40.0)
    
      - [AI-powered content platform founded in 2022](https://fathom.video/share/YBGoPVbw2DU9tzmjRy_EsyGazvJ-pxja?tab=summary&timestamp=40.0)
      - [Raised Series A in Feb 2023, now raising 40-60M Series B](https://fathom.video/share/YBGoPVbw2DU9tzmjRy_EsyGazvJ-pxja?tab=summary&timestamp=40.0)
      - [11M revenue, all inbound sales, 70%+ gross margins](https://fathom.video/share/YBGoPVbw2DU9tzmjRy_EsyGazvJ-pxja?tab=summary&timestamp=40.0)
      - [Clients include Webflow, Ramp, SentinelOne](https://fathom.video/share/YBGoPVbw2DU9tzmjRy_EsyGazvJ-pxja?tab=summary&timestamp=40.0)
      - [Leadership team from IBM, HP, TechCrunch](https://fathom.video/share/YBGoPVbw2DU9tzmjRy_EsyGazvJ-pxja?tab=summary&timestamp=40.0)

  - [Third Bridge:](https://fathom.video/share/YBGoPVbw2DU9tzmjRy_EsyGazvJ-pxja?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
    
      - [Founded in 2013, specializing in music/entertainment content](https://fathom.video/share/YBGoPVbw2DU9tzmjRy_EsyGazvJ-pxja?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
      - [Clients include Apple, Spotify, Sonos, Amazon, Netflix](https://fathom.video/share/YBGoPVbw2DU9tzmjRy_EsyGazvJ-pxja?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
      - [Facing challenges adapting to AI-driven content creation](https://fathom.video/share/YBGoPVbw2DU9tzmjRy_EsyGazvJ-pxja?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
      - [Revenue declining due to shifts in client needs (e.g., Apple's AI strategy change)](https://fathom.video/share/YBGoPVbw2DU9tzmjRy_EsyGazvJ-pxja?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)

### Third Bridge's Offerings

  - [Expert-curated playlists and music programming](https://fathom.video/share/YBGoPVbw2DU9tzmjRy_EsyGazvJ-pxja?tab=summary&timestamp=816.0)
  - [Content QA and output improvement for AI-generated content](https://fathom.video/share/YBGoPVbw2DU9tzmjRy_EsyGazvJ-pxja?tab=summary&timestamp=816.0)
  - [Artist bios, press releases, and marketing materials](https://fathom.video/share/YBGoPVbw2DU9tzmjRy_EsyGazvJ-pxja?tab=summary&timestamp=816.0)
  - [Global network of music and entertainment subject matter experts](https://fathom.video/share/YBGoPVbw2DU9tzmjRy_EsyGazvJ-pxja?tab=summary&timestamp=816.0)

### GrowthX.ai's Platform

  - [Combines strategy, AI workflows, experts-in-loop, and execution](https://fathom.video/share/YBGoPVbw2DU9tzmjRy_EsyGazvJ-pxja?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Workflow engine for research, content creation, and editing](https://fathom.video/share/YBGoPVbw2DU9tzmjRy_EsyGazvJ-pxja?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Three key roles: process architects, input calibrators, output bar raisers](https://fathom.video/share/YBGoPVbw2DU9tzmjRy_EsyGazvJ-pxja?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Adaptable to various content types (articles, catalogs, templates)](https://fathom.video/share/YBGoPVbw2DU9tzmjRy_EsyGazvJ-pxja?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)

### Potential Synergies

  - [Leverage Third Bridge's client relationships to upsell GrowthX.ai's AI platform](https://fathom.video/share/YBGoPVbw2DU9tzmjRy_EsyGazvJ-pxja?tab=summary&timestamp=1421.0)
  - [Expand into new verticals (record labels, podcast producers, movie studios)](https://fathom.video/share/YBGoPVbw2DU9tzmjRy_EsyGazvJ-pxja?tab=summary&timestamp=1421.0)
  - [Combine Third Bridge's expert network with GrowthX.ai's AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/YBGoPVbw2DU9tzmjRy_EsyGazvJ-pxja?tab=summary&timestamp=1421.0)
  - [Target legacy players with large catalogs but limited budgets](https://fathom.video/share/YBGoPVbw2DU9tzmjRy_EsyGazvJ-pxja?tab=summary&timestamp=1421.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX.ai to regroup internally after Series B pitch meetings](https://fathom.video/share/YBGoPVbw2DU9tzmjRy_EsyGazvJ-pxja?tab=summary&timestamp=1747.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up deep dive with Sam (Third Bridge CEO) in \~2 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/YBGoPVbw2DU9tzmjRy_EsyGazvJ-pxja?tab=summary&timestamp=1806.0)
  - [GrowthX.ai to send additional questions/considerations via email](https://fathom.video/share/YBGoPVbw2DU9tzmjRy_EsyGazvJ-pxja?tab=summary&timestamp=1818.0)
  - [Third Bridge to prepare updated pitch materials and package offerings](https://fathom.video/share/YBGoPVbw2DU9tzmjRy_EsyGazvJ-pxja?tab=summary&timestamp=1826.0)
  - [Explore potential in-person meeting in the Bay Area](https://fathom.video/share/YBGoPVbw2DU9tzmjRy_EsyGazvJ-pxja?tab=summary&timestamp=1732.0)
